name: Cocktail Shaker
description: A two- or three-piece shaker used to combine and chill ingredients with ice.

name: Double Old Fashioned Glass
description: A short, wide tumbler suited to drinks served over crushed or large-format ice.

name: Coupe Glass
description: A stemmed, shallow-bowled glass for cocktails served up (no ice).
typicalApplications: Shaken or stirred cocktails served up

name: Jigger
description: A dual-sided measuring tool for accurate cocktail proportions.

name: Fine Strainer
description: A small mesh strainer used alongside a hawthorne strainer to catch ice chips and pulp.
